description:
100% Open Source Toolkit for Large Language Models: Train, Tune, Chat on your own Machine

Transformer Lab is a free, open-source LLM workspace that you can run on your own computer. It is designed to go beyond what most modern open LLM applications allow. Using Transformer Lab you can easily finetune, evaluate, export and test LLMs across different inference engines and platforms.
What's Changed
- fix form validation ux for LoRA modal by @MashDevel in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/673
- Hide incompatible plugins in dropdown by @MashDevel in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/682
- Fix system message by adding a override button by @deep1401 in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/670
- Fix CSS for long experiment names by @deep1401 in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/688
- Dont install a plugin if no experiment is selected by @deep1401 in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/686
- Make plugin install non experiment dependent by @deep1401 in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/691
- Show Error When Chat Column Is Not in Valid Message Format by @mina-parham in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/695
New Contributors
- @MashDevel made their first contribution in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/673
Full Changelog: https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/compare/v0.20.3...v0.20.4
